vaultPicker.title: Meridian
vaultPicker.tagline: A knowledge base that works the way you do.
vaultPicker.vaultHint: A vault is a folder of Markdown files on your computer.
vaultPicker.welcomeDesc: Download the sample vault — a guided tour with docs, examples, graph view, and a canvas.
fileTree.deleteFolderConfirm: Delete folder "{{name}}" and all its contents? This cannot be undone.

gitPanel.step1Desc: Set up version history for this vault
gitPanel.step2Desc: Sign in to upload notes online
gitPanel.step3Desc: Choose where to store your backup
settings.title: System Settings
settings.resetConfirm: Are you sure you want to reset all settings to defaults?
settings.noResults: No settings found matching your query
settings.editor.title: Editor
settings.editor.description: Customize your markdown writing environment, tab options, and editor indicators.
settings.files.title: Files & Auto-Saving
settings.files.description: Configure internal links generation, auto-save triggers, and folder paths.
settings.appearance.title: Appearance
settings.appearance.description: Style your workspace layout, accent coloring, and overall window elements.
settings.canvas.title: Canvas
settings.canvas.description: Adjust behaviors, snapping, lines, and card customization on Spatial Canvas.
settings.plugins.title: Core Plugins
settings.plugins.description: Extend Meridian functionality by enabling or disabling modular core plugins.
settings.export.title: Export
settings.export.description: Configure PDF page size, frontmatter handling, and custom CSS for exported notes.
settings.sync.title: Sync & GitHub
settings.sync.description: Connect your GitHub account to sync vaults with private repositories.
settings.hotkeys.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
settings.hotkeys.description: Review keybindings and shortcuts used to control the app navigation.
settings.about.title: About Meridian
settings.appearance.languageDesc: Interface language. Community translations available on GitHub.
github.accountDesc: Used to authenticate git push/pull with private GitHub repositories.
